## Summary

Explain the problem this PR solves and the change you made.

## Validation

List the commands you ran and any manual checks you performed.

```text
bun run lint
bun run typecheck
```

Add anything else that matters, for example `bun run test`, `bun run build:web`, `bun run build`, or macOS manual verification.

## Screenshots Or Recordings

If the UI changed, include before/after screenshots or a short recording.

## Notes For Reviewers

Call out risk, tradeoffs, migrations, follow-up work, or anything you could not validate locally.
